description: Static gates promoted from docs/review/SELF_REVIEW.md recurring AgentLog PR review findings.

rules.title: Regression tests must reproduce the real bug input shape

checks.message: Add a timestamped Electron/Obsidian noise fixture, not only the bare message.

rules.title: Tests claiming no CLI invocation must prove it with a sentinel

checks.message: Use a mock CLI that creates a sentinel file if invoked.
Assert the sentinel file was not created.

rules.title: Config-derived or external paths must be confined to the vault root

checks.message: Route config/CLI-derived path joins through a vault confinement helper.
Add a traversal or absolute-path regression test.

rules.title: CLI stdout paths are untrusted

checks.message: Do not join CLI output directly under config.vault; confine it first.

checks.pattern: does not allow CLI paths outside the vault
checks.message: Add a regression test for unsafe CLI path output.

rules.title: Runtime behavior changes must be reflected in developer docs

checks.message: Update docs when Daily Note path resolution order changes.

rules.title: Documented source-prefixed session dividers must use runtime suffix length

checks.message: Use 8 session-id characters in source-prefixed divider examples, matching runtime `sessionId.slice(0, 8)`.

rules.title: CI should run on main pushes when main PRs are supported

checks.message: Include `main` in CI push branches when PRs can target main.

rules.title: Main-branch publish workflows must serialize release attempts

checks.message: Add workflow-level concurrency so concurrent main pushes cannot double-publish the same version.

rules.title: Release tag checks should gate the publish path once

checks.message: Use a job-level publish gate instead of repeating the same tag-check condition on many steps.

rules.title: Codex hook uninstall must fail cleanly on malformed hooks.json

checks.message: Wrap `unregisterCodexHook()` during uninstall so malformed hooks.json exits cleanly instead of printing a stack trace.

checks.pattern: uninstall --codex exits cleanly when (?:Codex )?hooks\.json is invalid
checks.message: Add a regression test for malformed Codex hooks.json during uninstall.

rules.title: Codex uninstall docs and output must include legacy notify cleanup

checks.pattern: Remove Codex hook only|Remove Codex hook from `~/.codex/hooks\.json` only
checks.message: Do not imply Codex uninstall only touches hooks or always restores notify; it may remove an AgentLog-owned legacy notify entry.
Emit a distinct message when Codex uninstall removes an AgentLog-owned legacy notify entry instead of restoring a previous command.
Document legacy Codex notify cleanup when documenting Codex uninstall.
Add a regression test for legacy notify removal when no restore command exists.

rules.title: EnglishAsk evaluator must not recursively evaluate itself

checks.message: Check `AGENTLOG_ENGLISHASK_EVAL` at the start of the notify entry point before reading stdin or forwarding.

checks.pattern: guarded evaluator child turns|without a notify argument|AGENTLOG_ENGLISHASK_EVAL
checks.message: Test that guarded evaluator child notify turns create no note, no forwarded notify, and no stdin wait.

rules.title: EnglishAsk evaluator must receive the raw prompt, not display formatting

checks.message: Pass the raw parsed prompt to EnglishAsk; reserve `prettyPrompt(...)` for Daily Note display.

checks.pattern: raw prompt to EnglishAsk|logging the display prompt|User prompt:\\n\$\{prompt\}
checks.message: Add a regression test proving the evaluator receives raw multi-line prompt text while the note logs the display prompt.

rules.title: EnglishAsk evaluator must tolerate unavailable notify cwd

checks.message: Do not run the evaluator blindly in notify `cwd`; fall back when that path is unavailable.
Add a regression test for unavailable notify cwd, matching CI/other-machine payloads.

rules.title: EnglishAsk prompt metadata must stay on one Markdown list line

checks.message: Flatten stored prompt metadata before writing it as a Markdown list item.
Add a regression test for truncated multi-line prompt metadata in `- prompt:`.

rules.title: EnglishAsk feedback must be inserted inside the existing section

checks.message: Insert new feedback before the next top-level heading after `## EnglishAsk`, not blindly at EOF.

checks.pattern: existing EnglishAsk section|immediately following top-level section|## Other
checks.message: Add regression tests proving new feedback lands inside `## EnglishAsk`, including when the next `##` heading follows immediately.

rules.title: EnglishAsk feedback must not escape its Markdown code fence

checks.message: Use a dynamic fence longer than any backtick run in evaluator feedback.
Add a regression test with evaluator feedback containing ``` and a heading-like line.

rules.title: EnglishAsk evaluator failures must not break AgentLog writes

checks.message: Add a regression test proving AgentLog still writes when EnglishAsk fails.
Add a regression test for evaluator timeout handling.
Add a regression test proving EnglishAsk feedback append failures stay fail-soft.

rules.title: Plan docs must not describe unsafe config.vault string concatenation

checks.message: Use path joining or confinement wording instead of `config.vault + relativePath` in plans.

rules.title: Plan docs must use the enforced Obsidian CLI minimum version

checks.message: Use `Obsidian CLI 1.12.4+` or reference `MIN_CLI_VERSION` in plans.

rules.title: Date format token support must be explicit and tested

checks.message: Keep an explicit list of supported date format tokens.
Test unsupported named tokens such as MMMM fallback to CLI.
Avoid unreachable Korean-character checks on ASCII regex tokens.
